name: flint-codex
description: Connect Codex to Flint governed knowledge through the production Flint MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Use governed Flint knowledge from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Flint connects Codex to the production Flint MCP server and teaches Codex how to discover governed knowledge and execute governed Routines as the external execution host.
defaultPrompt: Show me the Flint Libraries I can access.
Run the governed Flint Routine for this task.
Propose a governed update through Flint.
